response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple domains and languages, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or any direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated experience in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No documented professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lack of any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage
